content.text: 0. Introduction
This introductory chapter provides an overview of health and care insurance, linking concepts from SP1 and establishing the control/product cycles.
Sections covered: Advice for passing SA1, Links with SP1, Control and product cycles, and Further reading.
1. Advice to help you pass Subject SA1
1.1 Higher skills
Identify issues and investigations required in complex/unusual situations. Pore over details carefully.
Creative activity. Suggest methods/solutions based on analysis. Filter out irrelevant or minor points.
Make decisions/recommendations based on quality of supporting arguments rather than just the final result.
Use clear logical structure and meet audience needs (e.g., Marketing vs Director).
1.2 Problem solving
Revisit these skills in Chapter 26 'Solving Complex Issues'.
2. Links with Subject SP1
Subject SA1 builds upon SP1, revisiting topics in greater depth.
Knowledge of the entire SP1 course is essential for the SA1 exam.
3. Control and product cycles
3.1 The actuarial control cycle

flowchart TD
    SP[Specifying the Problem] --> DS[Developing the Solution]
    DS --> ME[Monitoring the Experience]
    ME --> SP
    ENV((Environment)) -.-> Cycle
    PROF((Professionalism)) -.-> Cycle
3.2 The product cycle

flowchart TD
    PD["Product design"] --> PR["Pricing"]
    PR --> MS["Marketing Sales"]
    MS --> UN["Underwriting"]
    UN --> CM["Claims management"]
    CM --> EM["Experience monitoring"]
    EM --> VL["Valuation"]
    VL --> PD
    EM -.Expert Feedback.-> PR
***Expert Synthesis: Six Pillar Framework*** [src:IAI_Master]
Focus on New Product features, Target Market, and Benefit Design. [Linked Themes: Product Design, Group Products, CI, IP, LTC, PMI, State Healthcare]. [src:IAI_Synthesis]
Focus on Assumptions (Morbidity/Mortality), Rating Factors, and Selective Underwriting. [Linked Themes: Pricing, Underwriting]. [src:IAI_Synthesis]
Focus on Fraud control, Triage, TPA management, and Cost containment. [Linked Themes: Claims Management]. [src:IAI_Synthesis]
Focus on Risk Taxonomy, Reinsurance structures, and SCR/Capital. [Linked Themes: Risks, Reinsurance, Risk Management & Capital]. [src:IAI_Synthesis]
Focus on BEL/Risk Margin, IBNR methods, Data quality, and Investments. [Linked Themes: Reserving & Valuation, Data, Models, Investments]. [src:IAI_Synthesis]
Focus on IRDAI 2024 updates, PPH, and the Appointed Actuary role. [Linked Themes: Regulation, IRDAI Regulations, Professionalism]. [src:IAI_Synthesis]
